title: Enovix Corp (ENVX) Reports Q3 2023 Financial Results Amid Strategic Advancements
text: Enovix reported modest quarterly revenue of $0.2 million, primarily from delivering custom cells for a U.S. Army program. The company's cost of revenue reached $16.8 million, while operating expenses decreased to $33.8 million. The firm maintained strong liquidity with cash totaling $371.3 million. Dr. Raj Talluri, President and CEO, highlighted that Enovix commenced Factory Acceptance Testing of its Gen2 manufacturing equipment and completed testing for one production zone. A significant strategic shift involved realigning Fab1 operations, transitioning from continuous manufacturing to research and development activities. For Q4 2023, management projected sequential revenue growth to between $3-4 million.
